summary: Farrier success story about Lilla Gumman, a severely foundered mare who recovered using Cavallo Simple hoof boots worn 24/7 for three months while her sole regrew.
Customer testimonial from Theresa Falzone praising Cavallo hoof boots, English saddle pad, high sport boots, and Flume women's riding boots for her horse Zeema and herself.
Guest blog post by Dutch Henry about Sprinkles, a rescued underweight Arab/Appaloosa cross rehabilitated at Hoofbeats Therapeutic Riding Center in Lexington, VA.
Event recap of a Jumpcross competition hosted by Cavallo's UK distributor Battles, where CEO Greg Giles met top riders including Oliver Townend interested in Cavallo hoof boots.
Conclusion of Yvonne Welz's essay 'The Barefoot Paradigm,' discussing differing barefoot trimming philosophies and urging unity within the barefoot horse movement.
Guest blog post by Joe Camp profiling donkey farrier Megan Hensley, who scaled back her steel horseshoeing business to focus on barefoot trimming of burros and ponies.
Short customer testimonial from Robert Ball praising the quality, ease of use, and secure fit of Cavallo Simple hoof boots ordered for his horse Joe.
Guest blog post by Dutch Henry about the Cowboy Church movement and its 'neighbor helping neighbor' charitable work, often using horses to help individuals and communities.
Short opinion piece arguing that metal horseshoeing is an outdated practice, comparing it to other abandoned historical beliefs and promoting barefoot alternatives.
Customer testimonial from Vicki about Dove, a 27-year-old rescued palomino quarter horse who can barely walk without her red Cavallo Simple hoof boots.
Personal narrative essay by Joe Camp on building a relationship with a horse, recounting his first round-pen encounter inspired by Monty Roberts' methods; includes a video.
Customer testimonial from Melissa, an outrider at The Meadows racetrack, on how Cavallo hoof boots ended her horses' shoe loss and brought a retired horse back to work.
